title: knema cinerea var. patentinervia
intro: Knema cinerea var. patentinervia, also known as the patent-veined knema, is a plant species in the family Myristicaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Knema cinerea var. patentinervia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into infusions or decoctions, and its leaves and stems are used to create traditional remedies in certain regions.
